title: Build/Buy/Partner analysis of solution components and suppliers

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

grain: one row per solution component evaluated for build/buy/partner
summary: For each solution component (grouped under a parent solution such as "Solution 1 FNOL"), this sheet records the capability gap, the evaluation criteria, and candidate suppliers split across InsureTech, TPA, and Other, plus a Y/N applicability flag and comments. Use it to see which external suppliers could fill each solution gap and how they are categorized.
use_cases: Which suppliers (InsureTech / TPA / Other) are candidates for a given solution component?
What is the capability gap for a solution component?
What evaluation criteria apply to a solution component?
Which components roll up under a given parent solution?

columns.name: Solution Name
columns.note: parent solution; only on the first component of each solution (90% empty)

examples.Gap Description:
1. Full scale multi-channel implementation has not been done with any client to date 
2. Mobile interface and reporting does not exist today
examples.Evaluation Criteria:
Market
Line of Business
Functional Capability
Applies to Solution

examples.Gap Description: EXL needs a partner with experience in client/customer sensitive data hosting on cloud compliant with regulations (AWS)

not_answerable.q: Which supplier was actually selected for a component?
not_answerable.reason: sheet lists candidates only; no selection/decision column

not_answerable.q: What is the price or contract value for a supplier?
